ocr_findings.description: Diagram image (groupware hub figure) replaced by img-1.jpeg placeholder; diagram label text in image (電子メール, ワークフローシステム, チャット, ファイル共有, 会議室予約, テレビ会議, 電子掲示板, スケジュール管理) not reproduced as inline text in OCR, but these same terms are captured in the preceding bullet list so content is not lost.

reviewer_notes: Page contains BPR/BPM study-tip box, workflow system sidebar, and groupware section with bullet list and diagram. All prose text faithfully reproduced. The groupware hub diagram is an image placeholder but its content is covered by the bullet list above it. No material content loss.
